findings.title: Runtime sampler flag transaction path lacks coverage
findings.impact: The PR adds a separate dynamic-config path for request/access/diagnostic sample rates that validates a batch, applies gflags transactionally, rolls back on failure, and preserves explicit-state semantics. The new tests exercise LogSampler::UpdateConfigFromFlags and proto updates directly, but they do not drive Flags::UpdateFlagParameter through this branch, so regressions in parsing, partial commit rollback, or request-only derivation from actual runtime flag maps would not fail any test.
findings.fix: Add a focused flags unit test that calls Flags::UpdateFlagParameter with sampler flag maps, asserting effective LogSampler ppm values for request-only derivation, explicit access/diagnostic overrides, and an invalid mixed batch that leaves both the gflag values and LogSampler snapshot at the previous-good config.
